title: organs
qhook: How many organs do you know?
response: No matter how much you know, we are gonna add your knowledge to that and uhh… enjoy!
organs: Organs are very important as they give a balance to our respiration, framework and strength. They help us survive! Let's get the heart as an example. Imagine it doesn’t exist, would you survive? No, right? That’s why they are very very important for our survival
diff: There are different functions for each different organ! Let’s take a look!
A2: These organs help transport oxygen through your whole body for energy and survival.
